hub-shell-detector.evidence: Intelligence.tsx, IntelligenceSignalDetail.tsx, IntelligenceHub.tsx all use useQuery/useIntelligence; no shell pattern on touched surfaces.

cta-validator.evidence: No Shop Now/Buy Now/Add to Cart on public Intelligence pages; Take action row uses CrossHubActionDispatcher (create deal, CRM, campaign, etc.).

live-demo-detector.evidence: Public Intelligence.tsx uses isLive from useIntelligence; DEMO banner when !isLive; signal detail uses live fetch.

usability_evidence.today_snapshot: Public /intelligence: sidebar labeled 'Today's snapshot' and 'What's new today' with explainer 'Signals in the feed right now, ranked by impact and freshness.'; feed section has id=signal-feed with 'Live feed' / 'All signals' and explainer 'Ranked by impact and freshness. Use the filter tabs to narrow by category.'
usability_evidence.signal_detail: Detail page has hero image, reading time, source, date, confidence, impact badge, topic, related brands; Take action row with CrossHubActionDispatcher; Related signals section (same category, up to 5 links).
usability_evidence.take_action_row: Take action row present on list cards (SignalCard CrossHubActionDispatcher) and on signal detail page (INTEL-UX-01 block with CrossHubActionDispatcher).
usability_evidence.dead_ends: No new dead ends; back link to /intelligence; related signals link to other detail pages.
usability_evidence.demo_live_confusion: Public Intelligence shows Preview mode banner when !isLive; no DEMO/LIVE confusion introduced.
